items.notes: Systematic: 6x [REMOVED] + 3x [SUSPENDED] in built index.html. Most originate from generate-html.js template. Some are historical factual claims (line 1309, 1323 describe dome behavior accurately with brackets). Main fix needed: line 304 generate-html.js text attributing bracket-marking to dome as active convention. Audit each of the 9 occurrences against raw-text snapshot to determine which are factual (dome DID label entries that way at some point) vs. invented (dome never used bracket markers).
